original_image_tags: A scan of the reverse side of an aged, yellowed document page. The paper is brittle with tattered edges and several holes (including two prominent punch holes at the top). The text visible is a faint, reversed impression of the typewritten content from the front side, making it largely illegible. Several stamps and markings are visible on this side.

elements.description: One ink stamp reading 'D MAIL ROOM FBI' with a date and time stamp 'G112 5:07 PM '56' and a faint, illegible rectangular red ink stamp near the bottom. Faint, mirrored typed text is visible through the paper, but no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the absence of photographs/sketches/diagrams and the presence of faint mirrored typed text; Description B adds specific details about an ink stamp and a faint red stamp that Description A does not mention, but they do not contradict each other.
